FOOTER.TAGLINE: Digital menus for every business. Simple, fast, modern.

ABOUT.TITLE: More Than Just a Menu
ABOUT.LEAD: eMeni enables the digital display of all types of menus — not exclusively for hospitality venues, but for every business or individual offering any kind of service.
ABOUT.FEATURE1_TEXT: Restaurants, stores, service providers — any entity can create and share their eMeni with just a few clicks.
ABOUT.FEATURE2_TEXT: Order a premium QR decoration for your venue. Elegant, durable, and always linked to your live eMeni.
ABOUT.FEATURE3_TEXT: Potential customers can check prices and book a spot — without needing to visit your location first.

QR.TITLE: Bring Your eMeni to Life
QR.SUBTITLE: Order a custom QR code decoration for your venue. Choose from metal, wood, plastic or sticker formats.
QR.NO_PRODUCTS: No products available at this time.
